content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix(auth_mw_expiry)
C: minimal_diff ∧ preserve_skew30 ∧ single_error_path
P: replace(cmp,"<le(",",") ∧ apply_skew(30) ∧ ret(")401")
V: test(boundary_eq) ∧ test(just_over) ∧ test(refresh_loop)
A: patch(le(expMs+skew30,nowMs) ⇒ "401") ∧ reg_test(skew30_boundary)

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(auth_mw_expiry).
Constraints: minimal_diff and preserve_skew30 and single_error_path.
Plan: replace(cmp, "<le(", ",") and apply_skew(30) and ret(")401").
Verify: test(boundary_eq) and test(just_over) and test(refresh_loop).
Answer target: patch(le(expMs+skew30, nowMs) implies "401") and regression test(skew30_boundary).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: default_arch
C: team(6) ∧ ddl("4 months") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ ops(pt_devops) ∧ traffic(modest)
P: choose(modular_monolith) ∧ seam(billing|core_app) ∧ defer(split)
V: time_to_first_release ∧ operability ∧ split_readiness
A: recommend(modular_monolith) ∧ short_why("small team(4) months ∧ PostgreSQL ∧ post release split")

[AUDIT]
Goal: default modular architecture.
Constraints: team(6) and deadline("4 months") and store("PostgreSQL") and ops(pt_devops) and traffic(modest).
Plan: choose(modular_monolith) and seam(billing or core_app) and defer(split).
Verify: time_to_first_release and operability and split_readiness.
Answer target: recommend(modular_monolith) and short rationale("small team(4) months ∧ PostgreSQL ∧ post release split").

@flint v0 hybrid
G: review("x-user-id")
C: public_gateway ∧ session_auth
P: drop_header("x-user-id") ∧ bind(session.userId) ∧ return("401")
V: test(spoofed_header) ∧ test(missing_session) ∧ test(cross_user_denial)
A: ! impersonation ∧ ! horizontal_privesc ∧ ? gateway_contract

[AUDIT]
Goal: review("x-user-id").
Constraints: public_gateway and session_auth.
Plan: drop_header("x-user-id") and bind(session.userId) and return("401").
Verify: test(spoofed_header) and test(missing_session) and test(cross_user_denial).
Answer target: high-risk impersonation and high-risk horizontal_privesc and uncertain gateway_contract.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: async_await ∧ minimal_change ∧ preserve("next(err)")
P: validate(missing_id) → call(db.findUser) → branch(not_found) → side_effects(audit.log ∧ cache.set) → respond
V: echo("async") ∧ echo("await") ∧ echo("next(err)") ∧ order_preserved ∧ single_error_map
A: patch(loadUser) ∧ test(missing_id ∧ not_found ∧ db_err ∧ success ∧ no_double_callback)

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadUser).
Constraints: async/await and minimal_change and preserve("next(err)").
Plan: validate(missing_id) then call(db.findUser) then branch(not_found) then side_effects(audit.log and cache.set) then respond.
Verify: echo("async") and echo("await") and echo("next(err)") and order preserved and single_error_map.
Answer target: patch(loadUser) and test(missing_id and not_found and db_err and success and no_double_callback).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix("heapUsed")
C: min_diff ∧ preserve_order ∧ no_sig_change
P: inspect("setInterval") ∧ find(retained_closures) ∧ null_refs(batch_rows) ∧ Δ(scope_batch_inside_tick)
V: test(empty_queue_ticks) ∧ test(heap_stable) ∧ test(batch_release)
A: root_cause("retained_closures") ∧ min_fix(null_batch_per_tick) ∧ reg_test("heapUsed")

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix("heapUsed").
Constraints: minimal diff and preserve execution order and no_sig_change.
Plan: inspect("setInterval") and find(retained_closures) and null_refs(batch_rows) and Δ(scope_batch_inside_tick).
Verify: test(empty_queue_ticks) and test(heap_stable) and test(batch_release).
Answer target: root_cause("retained_closures") and minimal fix(null_batch_per_tick) and regression test("heapUsed").

@flint v0 hybrid
G: design("audit_log_schema")
C: compliance_export ∧ ddl("7 years") ∧ lean_ops ∧ PostgreSQL
P: table(audit_log) → col("JSONB") → partition(month,range) → idx(ts,user_id) → policy(drop_old)
V: test(export_query) ∧ test(partition_prune) ∧ test(retention_drop)
A: schema_sketch ∧ partitioning_strategy ∧ short_why

[AUDIT]
Goal: design("audit_log_schema").
Constraints: compliance_export and deadline("7 years") and lean_ops and PostgreSQL.
Plan: table(audit log) then col("JSONB") then partition(month, range) then idx(ts, user_id) then policy(drop_old).
Verify: test(export_query) and test(partition_prune) and test(retention_drop).
Answer target: schema_sketch and partitioning_strategy and short rationale.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix(rl_spoof)
C: trust_boundary ∧ "X-Forwarded-For" ∧ "Redis"
P: drop("X-Forwarded-For") ∧ bind(req.ip) ∧ expire(key)
V: test(spoof_header) ∧ test(missing_ip) ∧ test(incr_ttl)
A: ! header_spoof ∧ ! key_unbounded ∧ ? proxy_chain

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(rl_spoof).
Constraints: trust_boundary and "X-Forwarded-For" and "Redis".
Plan: drop("X-Forwarded-For") and bind(req.ip) and expire(key).
Verify: test(spoof_header) and test(missing_ip) and test(incr_ttl).
Answer target: high-risk header_spoof and high-risk key_unbounded and uncertain proxy_chain.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: extract("@atlas/currency")
C: preserve(call_sites) ∧ keep("package.json") ∧ follow("semver")
P: inventory(duplicates) → define(api) → create("@atlas/currency") → replace(billing ∧ audit ∧ gateway) → Δ(imports_only)
V: unit(format_cases) ∧ snapshot(call_sites_unchanged) ∧ version_pin("semver")
A: pkg("@atlas/currency@0.1.0") ∧ release(internal_registry) ∧ bump("semver",minor) ∧ test(parity ∧ boundary ∧ locale)

[AUDIT]
Goal: extract("@atlas/currency").
Constraints: preserve(call_sites) and keep("package.json") and follow("semver").
Plan: inventory(duplicates) then define(api) then create("@atlas/currency") then replace(billing and audit and gateway) then Δ(imports_only).
Verify: unit(format_cases) and snapshot(call_sites_unchanged) and version_pin("semver").
Answer target: pkg("@atlas/currency@0.1.0") and release(internal_registry) and bump("semver", minor) and test(parity and boundary and locale).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: idempotent_webhook(atlas_payments)
C: retry_5xx ∧ dup_detect ∧ observable_replay ∧ store("PostgreSQL")
P: extract("Idempotency-Key") → upsert(key,payload_hash) → branch(new ∨ dup) → on_dup return("409") ∧ emit(replay_metric)
V: test(new_key) ∧ test(dup_key ⇒ "409") ∧ test(hash_mismatch) ∧ test(concurrent_same_key)
A: dedup(unique_idx "Idempotency-Key" ∧ payload_hash) ∧ err_model(conflict="409", retryable=5xx) ∧ why(single_write_site ∧ replay_safe)

@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix("N+1")
C: preserve_shape ∧ min_diff
H: loop("db.findUser") ⇒ n_plus_1
P: batch(customerId) → join_map → replace(loop) → bench(/invoices)
V: reg_test(latency_gate) ∧ shape_eq
A: min_fix ∧ reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix("N+1").
Constraints: preserve_shape and minimal diff.
Hypothesis: loop("db.findUser") implies n_plus_1.
Plan: batch(customerId) then join_map then replace(loop) then bench(/invoices).
Verify: regression test(latency_gate) and shape_eq.
Answer target: minimal fix and regression test.
